title: Accelerated Partnership for Renewables in Africa Kicks off Investment Forum in Nairobi - FinancialEDGE
description: The Accelerated Partnership for Renewables in Africa (APRA) Investment Forum officially kicks off today in Nairobi, convening ministers, investors, developers, and financial institutions to foster open dialogue, further the development of a robust project pipeline and mobilise large-scale investments to accelerate the energy transition and support the development of green industries within APRA countries. Under
html: The Accelerated Partnership for Renewables in Africa (APRA) Investment Forum officially kicks off today in Nairobi, convening ministers, investors, developers, and financial institutions to foster open dialogue, further the development of a robust project pipeline and mobilise large-scale investments to accelerate the energy transition and support the development of green industries within APRA countries.
